content.content:
Web search results for query: "CSS masonry layout "grid-template-rows: masonry" OR "display: grid-lanes" specification 2025 2026"

Links: [{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes (Masonry Layout) Is Here: A Complete Guide for 2026 - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/bean_bean/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout-is-here-a-complete-guide-for-2026-4686"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS | MDN","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes: The New Native Masonry Layout","url":"https://blog.openreplay.com/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout/"},{"title":"Creating a Responsive Pure CSS Masonry Layout - W3Bits","url":"https://w3bits.com/blog/css-masonry/"},{"title":"Introducing CSS Grid Lanes | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/17660/introducing-css-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://cpanelplus.net/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Masonry Layout: Native Grid Support","url":"https://www.sitepoint.com/css-masonry-layout-native-grid/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CSS masonry layout specifications for 2025-2026:

## Specification Overview

Level 3 of the CSS grid layout specification defines masonry layout (also known as grid-lanes layout), which is accessed via the display values grid-lanes and inline-grid-lanes.

## Current Syntax Evolution

The specification settled on the grid-lanes keyword rather than the earlier masonry proposal after years of debate between browser vendors. It was resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout in a January 2025 CSS Working Group meeting.

**Key distinction**: The Firefox-only grid-template-rows: masonry approach doesn't work anymore. It was dropped by CSSWG in favour of CSS Grid Lanes.

## Browser Support (2026)

In 2026, CSS Grid Lanes (formerly known as the masonry proposal) is the native browser answer — and Safari 26 just shipped it first. As of early 2026, CSS Grid Lanes is available in Safari 26 (first to ship). Chrome and Firefox have the feature behind experimental flags and are expected to ship stable support later in 2026.

## Basic Syntax

To create the most common masonry layout where the columns are laid out in a grid, and the rows stack like masonry, use display: grid-lanes along with grid-template-columns.
